name: Rakul C Kandavel
summary: Frontend developer with 3+ years of experience building responsive, accessible web and mobile interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Proven track record delivering production-grade UIs with AI integrations, real-time data, and WCAG compliance across cloud platforms including Firebase and Supabase.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Led front-end development of an AI-powered social shopping platform, integrating Gemini APIs for virtual try-ons and AI stylist features, driving adoption by 1,000+ active users.
Built responsive interfaces with React, TypeScript, and React Native ensuring WCAG accessibility compliance and high performance across iOS and Android.
Engineered real-time data pipelines on Supabase and Firebase supporting thousands of concurrent sessions.
Applied modular micro-architecture and Git workflows to ensure reliability and rapid deployment.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed a wellness app UI integrating Gemini, OpenAI, and Spoonacular APIs for personalized chatbot recommendations serving 500+ monthly active users.
Refactored the codebase into scalable TypeScript modules and optimized state management for performance.
Applied prompt engineering and schema ingestion pipelines boosting recommendation accuracy and user satisfaction.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Delivered responsive, mobile-first UI using React Native and Tailwind improving patient booking engagement by 40%.
Built a healthcare appointment booking system adopted by 200+ patients and providers, processing hundreds of bookings without downtime.
Integrated Firebase APIs for real-time scheduling and secure data handling.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Built a web application presenting predictive analytics with WCAG accessibility compliance for non-technical stakeholders.
Developed LSTM-based predictive model for time-series forecasting with 92% accuracy.
